carry_verdict.headline_en: MARGINAL — small loss of 0.04% per year
carry_verdict.headline_zh: 边缘亏损 — 对冲后亏 0.04%/年
carry_verdict.reasoning_en: Result sits inside the typical bid-offer / financing-spread band. Execution slippage will likely consume any apparent edge — treat as no-go for retail-sized positions.
carry_verdict.reasoning_zh: 结果落在常见的买卖价差与融资点差带内。下单滑点很可能吃掉这点收益 ——零售规模下视同不可做。

policy_stance.reading_en: One signal mildly tilts toward tolerating a weaker CNY. Not yet a clear policy direction.
policy_stance.reading_zh: 一条信号轻度倾向容忍人民币走弱。尚未形成明确的政策方向。
